subcodes.first_line: O distinguished and noble one! I supplicate unto the Kingdom on high and cling to the hem of divine grandeur that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفاضل الجلیل انی اتضرع الی الملکوت الاعلی و اتشبث بذیل الکبریاء ان
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God is its own standard, @empty learning; false spirituality, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @literal interpretation
